query: SELECT ms.sessionNumber, ms.presence, ms.taskStatus, ms.engagementScore, ms.sessionDate FROM mentoring_sessions ms JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id WHERE a.name LIKE '%Joseane%' ORDER BY ms.sessionNumber;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT ms.sessionNumber, ms.presence, ms.taskStatus, ms.engagementScore, ms.sessionDate FROM mentoring_sessions ms JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id WHERE a.name LIKE '%Joseane%' ORDER BY ms.sessionNumber;
